lessons.title: Bonded Structure Manufacturing and Discontinuity Types
objectives: Describe adhesive bonding and laminated/honeycomb construction processes
Identify disbonds, voids, and weak-bond conditions and how each forms
Map where bondline discontinuities typically occur in built-up structures

lessons.title: Ultrasonic Response of Bondline Discontinuities
objectives: Predict the origin and typical orientation of bondline discontinuities
Interpret pulse-echo, through-transmission, and resonance responses from disbonds
Differentiate near-side and far-side disbond signatures
cp105Topics: 4.3 Origin and typical orientation of discontinuities

lessons.title: Bonded Structure Acceptance Standards
objectives: Apply applicable codes and standards to bonded structure evaluations
Define recording and acceptance criteria for disbond size and density
Prepare an evaluation report for a bonded assembly inspection
